net.sf.saxon.serialize

Class ReconfigurableSerializer

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.saxon.event.SequenceReceiver
      • net.sf.saxon.event.ProxyReceiver
        • net.sf.saxon.serialize.ReconfigurableSerializer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    javax.xml.transform.Result, Receiver

    public class ReconfigurableSerializer
extends ProxyReceiver
    This class by default acts as a pass-through Receiver, acting as the gateway to a serialization pipeline. But it is capable of dynamic reconfiguration to construct a different serialization pipeline if required. This capability is invoked when xsl:result-document sets serialization parameters dynamically.
